description: System monitoring for security events and anomalies. SIEM configuration, alerting rules, log aggregation, threat detection coverage.

subcriteria.name: siem_configuration
subcriteria.reference_text: SIEM or log aggregation platform configured and active. Datadog, Splunk, CloudTrail, or equivalent collecting security events.

subcriteria.name: alert_rules
subcriteria.reference_text: Active alerting rules for security events. Rules covering failed logins, privilege escalation, configuration changes, unusual access patterns.

subcriteria.name: log_retention
subcriteria.reference_text: Log retention policy specifying minimum retention period. Typically 90 days online plus 1 year archive for SOC 2.

subcriteria.name: event_coverage
subcriteria.reference_text: List of monitored event types. Failed authentication, privilege escalation, config changes, data access, network anomalies.

mismatch_signals.reason: Uptime/availability monitoring is not security event monitoring. Auditors want SIEM logs, not StatusPage.
Application error logging without security event context is not security monitoring.
